$schema-comment: Smoke-test character rig for the Lasers & Feelings ruleset. Shape mirrors the blankSheet() snapshot the extension persists to localStorage, wrapped with name/role metadata so a human reader can scan the file without running the extension. Import is NOT automated — paste the `sheet` object into Marinara's character-library localStorage entry, or use the values as a hand-fill reference when creating a new character via the in-extension sheet editor.
name: Sparks McGee
summary: Hot-Shot Pilot, Alien stowaway turned crew. Number 4 — slight lean toward LASERS (science, precise action) over FEELINGS (intuition, passion). Looking to prove they're command material on every away mission.
notes: Stance lean: prefer LASERS when in doubt — face<4 on a d6 succeeds.
LASER FEELINGS triggers on rolling exactly 4 — that die counts as a success AND grants an honest GM answer.
Default pool is 1d6; +1d if prepared, +1d if expert, +1d per ally helping.
